entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species being studied, specifically Valencia and runner types

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the peanut crop

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Contamination of peanuts by aflatoxins resulting from stress-induced yield reduction

entities.name: VALENCIA-C
entities.description: A peanut genotype that is highly susceptible to drought stress

entities.name: C76-16
entities.description: A drought-tolerant runner type peanut genotype

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to investigate tissue-specific gene expression and response to stress

entities.name: TISSUE-SPECIFIC GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The expression of genes in specific tissues of the plant

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that cause stress to plants

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The natural environment where the genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to crops to prevent drought stress

entities.name: SOUTHWEST US
entities.description: The geographic region where C76-16 is best suited

entities.name: RNA ISOLATION
entities.description: The process of extracting RNA from plant samples

entities.name: SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the nucleotide sequence of RNA/DNA

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show statistically significant differences in expression between genotypes

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTS
entities.description: RNA molecules produced by the transcription of DNA

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain productivity under drought conditions

entities.name: EXPRESSION MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers based on gene expression levels used to identify drought tolerance
